sprint: Doodle -- a real multi-stroke freehand drawing capability
task: Direct follow-up: 'draw your own is just filling shape it does not allow you to draw irregular shape. can we upgrade this. infact this has potential to become doodle.' followed by 'the doodle implementation should live in doodle.' The Shape system's 'Draw Your Own' custom path (shape:'custom') always force-closed and filled its single captured stroke -- fine for an irregular but still closed silhouette, incapable of real line art (a stick figure needs several separate, unclosed strokes). Doodle is a genuinely new, separate sticker kind (st.kind==='doodle') left completely alongside Shape's own custom path: st.strokes is an array of {points,color,width}, one entry per pen-down..pen-up gesture, so a single drawing can freely mix any number of independently-coloured/thicknessed open strokes. New renderer/slideRenderer.js functions (_drawDoodleStrokes/_drawSceneDoodle/_doodleBbox) render every stroke as an open, round-capped/joined path -- never closed, never filled -- reusing the exact hit-test/drag/resize/lock/duplicate/delete/reorder/Object-Strip pipeline every sticker kind already shares (zero changes needed outside the render/Refine-panel layer). js/cardDesigner.js's Refine panel gained a Doodle controls group: 8 pen-colour swatches plus a custom picker, 3 pen-thickness tiles, a 260px live Draw pad, and real Undo Last Line/Clear All buttons -- pen colour/thickness are transient tool-state locals, only ever written into a completed stroke on release, so switching colour mid-drawing produces genuine multi-coloured line art. Context Panel's previously-disclosed-as-unbuilt 'Doodle' Coming Soon stub is now real and enabled; only Voice remains a disclosed stub. A real, unrelated latent bug found and fixed in the same pass: the prior sprint's freeform-text drawer was accidentally named _drawSceneText(st), silently shadowing a real pre-existing _drawSceneText(s,el) (a Scene-blueprint text-element drawer) via JS's last-declaration-wins semantics -- confirmed harmless in production (no blueprint anywhere creates a type:'text' element) but a genuine correctness bug, fixed by renaming to _drawFreeformText. Verified via a new Playwright test (doodle_test.js) driving two real, separate mouse-driven strokes with a colour/thickness change between them, confirming both strokes' own distinct colours actually painted and the space between/outside them stays blank -- never auto-filled like Shapes' closed blob -- plus Undo/Clear, Object Strip's real canvas thumbnail, and the live editor canvas itself. Full regression across the Creator/Builder/Card-Platform Playwright suite (two prior tests' own stale disabled-row-count assertions updated for this sprint's intentional new row; several other pre-existing failures confirmed via git stash to already fail identically on the unmodified baseline, unrelated to this change) and both goldenBuild.js suites passes unchanged, zero console errors. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder change.
